summary: Iteration 99 - End-to-end Stripe (test mode) giving verification for Eden Church. Full guest flow on /give/eden-church passed: Stripe Elements mounted in iframe, card 4242... submitted, backend created real PaymentIntent (pi_3TOh0p...) + PaymentMethod + Charge, server-side confirmed, donation persisted with payment_source='stripe' and test_mode=true. Receipt rendered with Gift $100, Fee covered $2.20, Total $102.20, Fund Tithes, Visa 4242, Transaction pi_... A second donation ($50 Offerings, $1.25 fee, $51.25 total) was also submitted successfully. /api/stripe/elements/config returns publishable_key+test_mode:true, /api/churches/eden-church/public-config returns correct funds (Tithes/Offerings/Building Fund/Missions) and theme (#000/#2dd4bf), /api/stripe/balance returns test_mode:true with pending cents reflecting real charge ($98.94 pending after $102.20 gross). Idempotency confirmed: re-POSTing /api/stripe/confirm-donation with same payment_intent_id returns already_recorded:true and does NOT create duplicate. SolomonPay admin UI (/solomonpay logged in as christopher@eden-x.io) correctly renders source toggle with 3 pills 'All 1 / Stripe 1 / Demo data 0'; clicking Stripe pill filters to the real donation; [data-testid='tx-badge-stripe-0'] reads 'STRIPE - TEST'; Today/Week/Month/YTD tiles show $50 / 1 gift; Top Fund = Offerings.

critical.issue: Returns 500 INTERNAL_ERROR instead of {status: 'reset', state.donations: 0}. Root cause: platform.py:47 calls `await audit_log(user, 'eden_church_reset', {'state': result['state']})` with 3 args, but the real signature in /app/backend/core/__init__.py:320 is `audit_log(action, entity_type, entity_id, tenant_id, user_id, user_name, ...)` (6 required positional args). The reset DB operation DOES succeed (donations are cleared on Mongo before the audit_log call fails) but the HTTP response is 500 due to TypeError: 'audit_log() missing 3 required positional arguments: tenant_id, user_id, and user_name'. Traceback visible in /var/log/supervisor/backend.err.log for correlation_id req_8c55b12434a3.

issues: Pre-existing React hydration warnings: <span> child of <tr>/<tbody> and <span> child of <select>. Carry-over from iter 97/98, not introduced this iteration.

action_items: FIX (HIGH): /app/backend/routes/platform.py line 47 - update audit_log() call to correct positional args. Suggested: `await audit_log(action='eden_church_reset', entity_type='tenant', entity_id='eden-church-001', tenant_id='eden-church-001', user_id=user['user_id'], user_name=user.get('name',''), meta={'state': result['state']})`. Otherwise endpoint returns 500 despite successful reset, which blocks main agent's smoke-test assertion `{status: reset, state.donations: 0}`.
LOW: Clean up pre-existing hydration warnings (<span> as child of <tr>/<tbody>/<select>) on /platform and /solomonpay dashboards.
critical_code_review_comments: stripe_elements.py: PaymentIntent creation, confirm-donation, idempotency check (already_recorded flag returning existing donation doc) all implemented correctly. Fee calc matches spec: $100 + 2.2% + $0.30 = $102.20.

Donation doc written by confirm-donation includes full Stripe trace fields: stripe_payment_intent_id, stripe_payment_method_id, stripe_charge_id, card_brand, card_last_four, test_mode, payment_source='stripe' - excellent for audit and reconciliation.

PublicGivingPage.jsx renders Eden branding correctly (black bg, cyan accent, Playfair 'Give', EDENX logo, TEST MODE banner). The cover-fees checkbox lacks a data-testid (only generic input[type='checkbox']), recommend adding [data-testid='give-cover-fees-toggle'] for robust automation.
solomonpay_admin.py dashboard+transactions accept source=stripe|demo|all correctly. source_counts returned as expected. tx-badge-stripe-N selectors wired correctly in SolomonPayAdmin.jsx.

BUG: platform.py:47 audit_log invocation is completely wrong arity - looks like copy-paste from a different older signature. Main agent should audit all other audit_log() call sites in platform.py for similar issues.

success_rate.backend: 90% (9/10 endpoints fully working; reset endpoint returns 500 despite DB ops succeeding)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (guest giving + admin dashboard both fully verified end-to-end)

seed_data_creation: Two REAL Stripe test PaymentIntents created during testing: pi_3TOh0pFbuKBbxZK716zWfxF9 ($100 Tithes, cover-fees=true, $102.20 charged) and pi_3TOh3XFbuKBbxZK71... ($50 Offerings, cover-fees=true, $51.25 charged). The first was wiped by the reset call (which internally succeeded). The second donation remains in DB at end of run. Main agent may want to call the reset endpoint AGAIN after fixing the audit_log bug to return Eden Church to 0 donations for demo.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Stripe (test mode) flows verified working except /api/admin/eden-church/reset which returns 500 due to audit_log() arity bug at platform.py:47. Key selectors that worked: PublicGivingPage - [data-testid='give-preset-100'] (also 25/50/250/500), [data-testid='give-submit'] (text 'GIVE $102.20'), [data-testid='give-card-element'] (container for Stripe iframe), [data-testid='give-success'], [data-testid='give-thankyou']. Stripe iframes match selector iframe[name^='__privateStripeFrame']; use frame_locator().first to target CardElement and fill input[name='cardnumber'/'exp-date'/'cvc'/'postal']. SolomonPay admin - [data-testid='solomonpay-source-toggle'], [data-testid='solomonpay-source-all'|'-stripe'|'-demo'], [data-testid='tx-badge-stripe-0']. Note: the cover-fees checkbox on PublicGivingPage has no data-testid - recommended to add.
rca of the issue: Reset 500 RCA: /app/backend/routes/platform.py line 47 calls `await audit_log(user, 'eden_church_reset', {'state': result['state']})` passing 3 positional args, but audit_log's real signature in /app/backend/core/__init__.py line 320 is `async def audit_log(action, entity_type, entity_id, tenant_id, user_id, user_name, ...)`. FastAPI catches the TypeError, returns 500 with correlation_id. The reset DB operations (reset_eden_data_only + verify_clean_state) complete successfully BEFORE audit_log is called, so donations are actually cleared - dashboard confirms 0 donations post-reset. Fix: update the call to use keyword args with correct values. Reproduction: curl -X POST https://secure-deploy-17.preview.emergentagent.com/api/admin/eden-church/reset -H 'Authorization: Bearer <platform_admin_token>' -> 500. Mitigation: the reset still works functionally for the demo (data is cleared), but main agent must fix this to return the documented JSON response so any client consuming the endpoint doesn't error out.
